annotations.text: TUI opens with the coordinator running. The graph view shows existing tasks on the left, chat panel on the right.
User types a request: "Plan a heist movie night — snacks, movie picks, and a debate."
Coordinator receives the message and creates a task graph — parallel sub-tasks for snacks, movie picks, and debate topics.
Agents spawn and fan out across tasks. Each works independently — snack research, movie selection, debate prep.
Tasks complete one by one. The graph updates in real-time as agents finish their work and results flow in.
All parallel tasks converge — the full movie night plan comes together. Agents spawned, worked, and finished autonomously.
